    x1 = objects(I, T, T, T)

    x5 = fork(equality, identity, rot90)
    x6 = compose(x5, x4)
    x7 = extract(x1, x6)

    x11 = objects(x10, F, T, T)
    x12 = first(x11)

    x19 = shift(x12, x18)
    x20 = paint(I, x19)
    x21 = objects(x20, F, T, T)
    x22 = first(x21)
    x23 = subgrid(x22, x20)
    x24 = vmirror(x23)
    x25 = objects(x24, F, T, T)
    x26 = first(x25)

    x30 = extract(x27, x29)
    x31 = center(x30)
    x32 = subtract(x8, x31)
